text.en: Have you identified the main business drivers?
text.zh: 您是否已辨識主要的業務驅動因素？

scenario.en: Business drivers are unknown
scenario.zh: 業務驅動因素不明

scenario.en: Basic awareness of business drivers
scenario.zh: 對業務驅動因素有基本認知

scenario.en: Some business drivers have been identified
scenario.zh: 已辨識部分業務驅動因素

scenario.en: Most business drivers have been identified
scenario.zh: 已辨識大部分業務驅動因素

scenario.en: All business drivers are well known within the SOC
scenario.zh: SOC 內部充分了解所有業務驅動因素

text.en: Have you documented the main business drivers?
text.zh: 您是否已將主要業務驅動因素文件化？

scenario.en: No documentation in place
scenario.zh: 尚無任何文件

scenario.en: Some ad-hoc information across documents
scenario.zh: 資訊零散分布於各文件中，臨機應變

scenario.en: Basic documentation of business drivers
scenario.zh: 已有業務驅動因素的基本文件

scenario.en: Single document, full description of business drivers
scenario.zh: 彙整為單一文件，完整描述業務驅動因素

scenario.en: Document completed, approved and formally published
scenario.zh: 文件已完成、核准並正式發布

text.en: Do you use business drivers in the decision making process?
text.zh: 您是否在決策過程中運用業務驅動因素？

scenario.en: Business drivers are not part of decision making
scenario.zh: 業務驅動因素未納入決策考量

scenario.en: Business drivers are referred to on an ad-hoc basis
scenario.zh: 僅在臨機需要時參考業務驅動因素

scenario.en: Business drivers are occasionally used in decisions
scenario.zh: 偶爾在決策中運用業務驅動因素

scenario.en: Business drivers are used in most decisions
scenario.zh: 多數決策都運用業務驅動因素

scenario.en: Business drivers are used in all relevant decisions
scenario.zh: 所有相關決策都運用業務驅動因素

text.en: Do you regularly check if the current service catalogue is aligned with business drivers?
text.zh: 您是否定期檢視現行服務目錄與業務驅動因素的一致性？

scenario.en: Service catalogue has not been checked for alignment
scenario.zh: 尚未檢視服務目錄的一致性

scenario.en: Alignment is performed on an ad-hoc basis
scenario.zh: 僅臨機進行一致性檢視

scenario.en: Alignment was performed but not maintained
scenario.zh: 曾進行一致性檢視但未持續維護

scenario.en: Alignment is performed and maintained regularly
scenario.zh: 定期進行並維護一致性檢視

scenario.en: Every change in the catalogue is checked against drivers
scenario.zh: 服務目錄的每次變更都會對照業務驅動因素檢視

text.en: Have the business drivers been validated with business stakeholders?
text.zh: 業務驅動因素是否已與業務利害關係人確認？

scenario.en: Business drivers have not been validated
scenario.zh: 業務驅動因素尚未經過確認

scenario.en: Basic awareness of SOC drivers exists among stakeholders
scenario.zh: 利害關係人對 SOC 驅動因素有基本認知

scenario.en: Stakeholders informally informed of business drivers
scenario.zh: 已非正式地向利害關係人告知業務驅動因素

scenario.en: Alignment of SOC drivers with stakeholders is performed
scenario.zh: 已與利害關係人對齊 SOC 驅動因素

scenario.en: Business drivers are formally validated by stakeholders
scenario.zh: 業務驅動因素已由利害關係人正式確認

text.en: Have you identified the SOC customers & stakeholders?
text.zh: 您是否已辨識 SOC 的客戶與利害關係人？

scenario.en: SOC customers are not known
scenario.zh: SOC 客戶不明

scenario.en: Basic awareness of SOC customers
scenario.zh: 對 SOC 客戶有基本認知

scenario.en: Some customers have been identified
scenario.zh: 已辨識部分客戶

scenario.en: Customers have mostly been identified
scenario.zh: 已辨識大部分客戶

scenario.en: All customers are identified, including relevance and context
scenario.zh: 已辨識所有客戶，包含其重要性與情境脈絡

text.en: Have you documented the main SOC customers & stakeholders?
text.zh: 您是否已將主要 SOC 客戶與利害關係人文件化？

scenario.en: No documentation in place
scenario.zh: 尚無任何文件

scenario.en: Some ad-hoc information across documents
scenario.zh: 資訊零散分布於各文件中，臨機應變

scenario.en: Basic documentation of SOC customers
scenario.zh: 已有 SOC 客戶的基本文件

scenario.en: Single document, full description of SOC customers
scenario.zh: 彙整為單一文件，完整描述 SOC 客戶

scenario.en: Document completed, approved and formally published
scenario.zh: 文件已完成、核准並正式發布

text.en: Do you differentiate output towards these specific customers & stakeholders?
text.zh: 您是否針對這些特定客戶與利害關係人提供差異化的產出？

scenario.en: Output is the same for all customers
scenario.zh: 對所有客戶提供相同產出

scenario.en: Output is somewhat contextualized
scenario.zh: 產出有一定程度的情境化調整

scenario.en: Some customers receive differentiated output
scenario.zh: 部分客戶可獲得差異化產出

scenario.en: All important customers receive differentiated output
scenario.zh: 所有重要客戶都獲得差異化產出

scenario.en: All customers receive specific output based on context and type
scenario.zh: 所有客戶都依其情境與類型獲得專屬產出

text.en: Do you have service level agreements with these customers & stakeholders?
text.zh: 您是否與這些客戶及利害關係人訂有服務水準協議（SLA）？

scenario.en: Contractual agreements not in place
scenario.zh: 尚無任何契約協議

scenario.en: No contract in place, ad-hoc agreements made
scenario.zh: 無正式契約，僅有臨機達成的協議

scenario.en: Basic contract in place, not formally signed of
scenario.zh: 已有基本契約，但尚未正式簽署

scenario.en: Contract signed, but not regularly reviewed
scenario.zh: 契約已簽署，但未定期檢討

scenario.en: Contract signed, approved by- and regularly reviewed with customers
scenario.zh: 契約已簽署核准，並定期與客戶共同檢討

text.en: Do you regularly send updates to your customers & stakeholders?
text.zh: 您是否定期向客戶與利害關係人提供更新資訊？

scenario.en: No updates sent to customers
scenario.zh: 未向客戶提供任何更新

scenario.en: Ad-hoc updates sent to some customers
scenario.zh: 臨機向部分客戶提供更新

scenario.en: Frequent updates sent to most customers
scenario.zh: 經常向大部分客戶提供更新

scenario.en: Periodical updates sent to all customers
scenario.zh: 定期向所有客戶提供更新

scenario.en: Periodical updates sent and discussed with all customers
scenario.zh: 定期向所有客戶提供更新並共同討論

text.en: Do you actively measure and manage customer & stakeholder satisfaction?
text.zh: 您是否主動衡量並管理客戶與利害關係人的滿意度？

scenario.en: Customer satisfaction not measured or managed
scenario.zh: 未衡量或管理客戶滿意度

scenario.en: Customer satisfaction managed in ad-hoc fashion
scenario.zh: 以臨機方式管理客戶滿意度

scenario.en: Customer satisfaction metrics defined, not applied structurally
scenario.zh: 已定義客戶滿意度指標，但未有系統性運用

scenario.en: Customer satisfaction measured structurally, not actively managed
scenario.zh: 有系統性衡量客戶滿意度，但未主動管理

scenario.en: Customer satisfaction fully managed and improved over time
scenario.zh: 完整管理客戶滿意度並持續改善

text.en: Does the SOC have a formal charter document in place?
text.zh: SOC 是否訂有正式的章程文件？

scenario.en: No charter document in place
scenario.zh: 尚無章程文件

scenario.en: Some ad-hoc information across documents
scenario.zh: 資訊零散分布於各文件中，臨機應變

scenario.en: Basic charter document created
scenario.zh: 已建立基本章程文件

scenario.en: Single charter, full description of SOC strategic elements
scenario.zh: 彙整為單一章程，完整描述 SOC 策略要素

scenario.en: Charter completed, approved and formally published
scenario.zh: 章程已完成、核准並正式發布

text.en: Is the SOC charter document regularly updated?
text.zh: SOC 章程文件是否定期更新？

scenario.en: Charter is never updated
scenario.zh: 章程從未更新

scenario.en: Charter is updated on ad-hoc basis
scenario.zh: 章程僅臨機更新

scenario.en: Charter is updated on major changes in business strategy
scenario.zh: 章程於業務策略重大變動時更新

scenario.en: Charter is regularly updated
scenario.zh: 章程定期更新

scenario.en: Charter periodically updated and realigned with business strategy
scenario.zh: 章程定期更新並與業務策略重新對齊

text.en: Is the SOC charter document approved by the business / CISO?
text.zh: SOC 章程文件是否經業務單位／資安長（CISO）核准？

scenario.en: Charter is not approved
scenario.zh: 章程未經核准

scenario.en: Business / CISO has basic awareness of the charter
scenario.zh: 業務單位／資安長對章程有基本認知

scenario.en: Business / CISO has full awareness of the charter
scenario.zh: 業務單位／資安長充分了解章程

scenario.en: Business / CISO approves of the content, but not formally
scenario.zh: 業務單位／資安長認同內容，但未正式核准

scenario.en: Charter is formally approved by the business / CISO
scenario.zh: 章程已由業務單位／資安長正式核准

text.en: Are all stakeholders familiar with the SOC charter document contents?
text.zh: 所有利害關係人是否熟悉 SOC 章程文件內容？

scenario.en: Stakeholders are unfamiliar with the charter
scenario.zh: 利害關係人不熟悉章程

scenario.en: Some stakeholders are aware of the charter, but not its contents
scenario.zh: 部分利害關係人知道有章程，但不了解其內容

scenario.en: Some stakeholders are aware of the charter and its contents
scenario.zh: 部分利害關係人了解章程及其內容

scenario.en: All stakeholders are aware, not all stakeholders know its contents
scenario.zh: 所有利害關係人都知道章程，但並非都了解其內容

scenario.en: All Stakeholders are aware of the charter and its contents
scenario.zh: 所有利害關係人都了解章程及其內容

text.en: Does the SOC have a governance process in place?
text.zh: SOC 是否建立了治理流程？

scenario.en: SOC governance process is not in place
scenario.zh: 尚未建立 SOC 治理流程

scenario.en: SOC governance is done in an ad-hoc fashion
scenario.zh: SOC 治理以臨機方式進行

scenario.en: Several governance elements are in place, but not structurally
scenario.zh: 已有若干治理要素，但未成體系

scenario.en: Formal governance process is in place that covers most SOC aspects
scenario.zh: 已建立正式治理流程，涵蓋大部分 SOC 面向

scenario.en: Formal governance process is in place and covers all SOC aspects
scenario.zh: 已建立正式治理流程，涵蓋所有 SOC 面向

text.en: Have all governance elements been identified?
text.zh: 是否已辨識所有治理要素？

scenario.en: No governance elements have been identified
scenario.zh: 尚未辨識任何治理要素

scenario.en: Some governance elements are identified and governed ad-hoc
scenario.zh: 已辨識部分治理要素並臨機治理

scenario.en: Some governance elements are identified and governed actively
scenario.zh: 已辨識部分治理要素並主動治理

scenario.en: Most governance elements are identified and actively governed
scenario.zh: 已辨識大部分治理要素並主動治理

scenario.en: All elements are identified and actively governed
scenario.zh: 已辨識所有要素並主動治理

text.en: Is cost management in place?
text.zh: 是否建立了成本管理機制？

scenario.en: Cost management not in place
scenario.zh: 尚無成本管理

scenario.en: Costs visible, basic budget allocation in place
scenario.zh: 成本可視，並有基本的預算分配

scenario.en: Costs fully visible and mostly managed, forecasting in place
scenario.zh: 成本完全可視且大致受管理，並有預測機制

scenario.en: Costs fully managed, not formally aligned with business stakeholders
scenario.zh: 成本完整受管理，但未與業務利害關係人正式對齊

scenario.en: Costs fully managed and formally aligned with business stakeholders
scenario.zh: 成本完整受管理並與業務利害關係人正式對齊

text.en: Are SOC governance meetings regularly held?
text.zh: 是否定期召開 SOC 治理會議？

scenario.en: No governance meetings held
scenario.zh: 未召開治理會議

scenario.en: Governance meetings held in an ad-hoc fashion
scenario.zh: 以臨機方式召開治理會議

scenario.en: Governance meetings regularly scheduled
scenario.zh: 定期排定治理會議

scenario.en: Governance meetings at different levels scheduled and structured
scenario.zh: 於不同層級排定並結構化治理會議

scenario.en: Governance meetings at different levels scheduled, ToR formalised
scenario.zh: 於不同層級排定治理會議，並訂有正式議事章程（ToR）

text.en: Is the governance process regularly reviewed?
text.zh: 治理流程是否定期檢討？

scenario.en: Governance process is not reviewed
scenario.zh: 治理流程未經檢討

scenario.en: Governance process is reviewed in an ad-hoc fashion
scenario.zh: 治理流程以臨機方式檢討

scenario.en: Process is reviewed using a structured approach in an ad-hoc fashion
scenario.zh: 以結構化方法但臨機地檢討流程

scenario.en: Process is regularly and informally reviewed and updated
scenario.zh: 定期且非正式地檢討與更新流程

scenario.en: Process is regularly and formally reviewed and updated with findings
scenario.zh: 定期且正式地檢討流程，並依發現事項更新

text.en: Is the governance process aligned with all stakeholders?
text.zh: 治理流程是否與所有利害關係人對齊？

scenario.en: Stakeholders are unfamiliar with the process
scenario.zh: 利害關係人不熟悉此流程

scenario.en: Some stakeholders are aware of the process, but not its details
scenario.zh: 部分利害關係人知道此流程，但不了解細節

scenario.en: Some stakeholders are aware of the process and its details
scenario.zh: 部分利害關係人了解此流程及其細節

scenario.en: All stakeholders are aware, not all stakeholders know its details
scenario.zh: 所有利害關係人都知道此流程，但並非都了解細節

scenario.en: All stakeholders are aware of the process and its details
scenario.zh: 所有利害關係人都了解此流程及其細節

text.en: Is the SOC regularly audited or subjected to (external) assessments?
text.zh: SOC 是否定期接受稽核或（外部）評鑑？

scenario.en: No assessments are performed
scenario.zh: 未進行任何評鑑

scenario.en: The SOC is assessed in an ad-hoc fashion
scenario.zh: SOC 以臨機方式接受評鑑

scenario.en: The SOC is assessed using a structured approach in an ad-hoc fashion
scenario.zh: 以結構化方法但臨機地評鑑 SOC

scenario.en: The SOC is regularly and informally assessed
scenario.zh: 定期且非正式地評鑑 SOC

scenario.en: The SOC is regularly and formally assessed by a third party
scenario.zh: 由第三方定期且正式地評鑑 SOC

text.en: Is there an active cooperation with other SOCs (external)?
text.zh: 是否與其他（外部）SOC 有積極合作？

scenario.en: No cooperation with other SOCs
scenario.zh: 未與其他 SOC 合作

scenario.en: Some ad-hoc informal information exchange
scenario.zh: 有部分臨機、非正式的資訊交流

scenario.en: Regular exchange with external SOCs, no defined process
scenario.zh: 與外部 SOC 定期交流，但無明確流程

scenario.en: Defined process for information exchange, regular exchange in place
scenario.zh: 已訂定資訊交流流程並定期交流

scenario.en: Continuous formalized active cooperation and information exchange
scenario.zh: 持續、正式且積極的合作與資訊交流

text.en: Is there an information security policy in place that supports the SOC activities?
text.zh: 是否有支援 SOC 活動的資訊安全政策？

scenario.en: No formal information security policy in place
scenario.zh: 尚無正式的資訊安全政策

scenario.en: Information security policy in place, no mention of SOC activities
scenario.zh: 已有資訊安全政策，但未提及 SOC 活動

scenario.en: Policy in place, SOC activities mentioned without mandate
scenario.zh: 已有政策並提及 SOC 活動，但未賦予授權

scenario.en: Policy in place, SOC activities mentioned in detail with mandate
scenario.zh: 已有政策並詳述 SOC 活動且賦予授權

scenario.en: Policy with SOC activities and mandate in place, actively communicated
scenario.zh: 政策已涵蓋 SOC 活動與授權，並主動宣導

text.en: Has a SOC policy been created?
text.zh: 是否已制定 SOC 政策？

scenario.en: No SOC policy in place
scenario.zh: 尚無 SOC 政策

scenario.en: Some ad-hoc information across documents
scenario.zh: 資訊零散分布於各文件中，臨機應變

scenario.en: Basic SOC policy document created
scenario.zh: 已建立基本 SOC 政策文件

scenario.en: Single document, full description of SOC policy elements
scenario.zh: 彙整為單一文件，完整描述 SOC 政策要素

scenario.en: SOC policy document completed, approved and formally published
scenario.zh: SOC 政策文件已完成、核准並正式發布

text.en: Is the SOC consulted in the creation and updates of operational security policy?
text.zh: 在制定與更新營運資安政策時，是否會諮詢 SOC？

scenario.en: SOC not consulted or informed of policy creation or policy updates
scenario.zh: 政策制定或更新時未諮詢或告知 SOC

scenario.en: SOC informed of policy creation and updates only
scenario.zh: 僅於政策制定與更新時告知 SOC

scenario.en: SOC consulted before policy creation and updates, not actively involved
scenario.zh: 政策制定與更新前會諮詢 SOC，但未積極參與

scenario.en: SOC consulted before policy creation and updates, performs reviews
scenario.zh: 政策制定與更新前會諮詢 SOC，並由其進行審查

scenario.en: Full involvement of the SOC in the creation of operational security policy
scenario.zh: SOC 全程參與營運資安政策的制定

text.en: Is a reporting policy for security incidents in place?
text.zh: 是否訂有資安事件的通報政策？

scenario.en: No reporting policy in place
scenario.zh: 尚無通報政策

scenario.en: Policy in place, no mention of the SOC
scenario.zh: 已有政策，但未提及 SOC

scenario.en: Policy in place, role of the SOC in security incidents mentioned
scenario.zh: 已有政策並提及 SOC 在資安事件中的角色

scenario.en: Policy in place with all SOC activities, no central point for reporting
scenario.zh: 政策涵蓋所有 SOC 活動，但無集中通報窗口

scenario.en: Policy & central point for reporting in place, SOC part of the workflow
scenario.zh: 已有政策與集中通報窗口，且 SOC 納入工作流程

text.en: Is a privacy policy regarding security monitoring of employees in place?
text.zh: 是否訂有關於員工資安監控的隱私政策？

scenario.en: No policy is in place
scenario.zh: 尚無政策

scenario.en: Information regarding privacy is scattered across documents
scenario.zh: 隱私相關資訊零散分布於各文件中

scenario.en: A policy exists, but has not been accepted formally
scenario.zh: 已有政策，但尚未正式採納

scenario.en: A formal policy exists, its contents are known to all employees
scenario.zh: 已有正式政策，且全體員工知悉其內容

scenario.en: A formal policy exists, its contents are accepted by all employees
scenario.zh: 已有正式政策，且全體員工接受其內容

text.en: Does the SOC operate in compliance with all applicable privacy laws and regulations?
text.zh: SOC 的運作是否遵循所有適用的隱私法令與法規？

scenario.en: Regulations are not known and the SOC is non-compliant
scenario.zh: 不了解相關法規，且 SOC 未合規

scenario.en: Some regulations are known and the SOC is non-compliant
scenario.zh: 了解部分法規，但 SOC 未合規

scenario.en: Most regulations are known and the SOC is partially compliant
scenario.zh: 了解大部分法規，且 SOC 部分合規

scenario.en: Regulations are fully known and the SOC is mostly compliant
scenario.zh: 充分了解法規，且 SOC 大致合規

scenario.en: Regulations are fully known and the SOC is fully compliant
scenario.zh: 充分了解法規，且 SOC 完全合規

text.en: Does the SOC cooperate with legal departments regarding privacy matters?
text.zh: SOC 在隱私事務上是否與法務部門合作？

scenario.en: There is no cooperation between the SOC and legal
scenario.zh: SOC 與法務之間沒有合作

scenario.en: There is some ad-hoc cooperation between SOC and legal
scenario.zh: SOC 與法務之間有部分臨機合作

scenario.en: There is structural cooperation between SOC and legal
scenario.zh: SOC 與法務之間有體系化合作

scenario.en: Alignment exists between SOC and legal
scenario.zh: SOC 與法務之間已有對齊

scenario.en: Full and regular alignment exists between SOC and legal
scenario.zh: SOC 與法務之間有全面且定期的對齊

text.en: Are specific procedures in place for dealing with privacy related investigations?
text.zh: 是否訂有處理隱私相關調查的特定程序？

scenario.en: No privacy procedures in place
scenario.zh: 尚無隱私處理程序

scenario.en: Some ad-hoc information across documents
scenario.zh: 資訊零散分布於各文件中，臨機應變

scenario.en: Basic privacy procedure created
scenario.zh: 已建立基本隱私處理程序

scenario.en: Single document, full description of privacy investigations
scenario.zh: 彙整為單一文件，完整描述隱私調查程序

scenario.en: Procedure completed, approved and formally published
scenario.zh: 程序已完成、核准並正式發布

text.en: Specify rationale for chosen values or any additional comments
text.zh: 說明選擇此評分的理由或其他補充意見

scenario.en: The SOC is unaware of any information
scenario.zh: SOC 對任何相關資訊均不知情

scenario.en: The SOC is aware of such information, no formal identification

scenario.zh: 尚無發布流程

scenario.en: Releases performed in an ad-hoc manner
scenario.zh: 以臨機方式進行發布

scenario.en: Releases done structurally, process not documented of formalised
scenario.zh: 有系統地進行發布，但流程未文件化或正式化

scenario.en: Releases done structurally, process documentation in place
scenario.zh: 有系統地進行發布，且流程已文件化

scenario.en: Formal release procedure in place, documented and regularly evaluated
scenario.zh: 已有正式發布程序，並文件化且定期評估

text.en: Do you apply a versioning system to detections?
text.zh: 您是否對偵測規則套用版本控管系統？

scenario.en: Versioning system not in place
scenario.zh: 尚無版本控管系統

scenario.en: Versioning system in place, not actively used
scenario.zh: 已有版本控管系統，但未積極使用

scenario.en: Versioning system used for some detections
scenario.zh: 對部分偵測規則使用版本控管系統

scenario.en: Versioning system used for all detections, no formal commit procedure
scenario.zh: 對所有偵測規則使用版本控管系統，但無正式提交程序

scenario.en: Versioning system used for all detections, commit procedure formalised
scenario.zh: 對所有偵測規則使用版本控管系統，並將提交程序正式化

text.en: Do you have a roll-back procedure in place in case of problems with detections?
text.zh: 當偵測規則出現問題時，您是否有回復（roll-back）程序？

scenario.en: Roll-back procedure not in place
scenario.zh: 尚無回復程序

scenario.en: Roll-back procedure requirements understood, but not operationalized
scenario.zh: 已理解回復程序需求，但尚未落實運作

scenario.en: Roll-back capability in place, but not documented
scenario.zh: 已有回復能力，但未文件化

scenario.en: Roll-back capability in place and documented
scenario.zh: 已有回復能力並文件化

scenario.en: Formal roll-back capability in place, documented and regularly tested
scenario.zh: 已有正式回復能力，並文件化且定期測試

text.en: Do you perform adversary emulation or automated detection testing? [1]
text.zh: 您是否進行對手模擬或自動化偵測測試？[1]

scenario.en: Validation activities not performed
scenario.zh: 未進行驗證活動

scenario.en: Validation activities performed in an ad-hoc fashion
scenario.zh: 以臨機方式進行驗證活動

scenario.en: Validation activities performed structurally, no documented process
scenario.zh: 有系統地進行驗證活動，但無文件化流程

scenario.en: Validation activities performed structurally following a documented process
scenario.zh: 有系統地進行驗證活動，並遵循文件化流程

scenario.en: Validation activities fully aligned with TI and continuously improved
scenario.zh: 驗證活動與威脅情資完全對齊並持續改善

text.en: Do you test for detection of MITRE ATT&CK® techniques?
text.zh: 您是否測試對 MITRE ATT&CK® 技術的偵測能力？

scenario.en: Use case testing not in place
scenario.zh: 尚無使用案例測試

scenario.en: Use case testing performed in ad-hoc fashion, no detection targets set
scenario.zh: 以臨機方式進行使用案例測試，未設定偵測目標

scenario.en: Some use case testing performed, detection targets set, no formal process
scenario.zh: 進行部分使用案例測試並設定偵測目標，但無正式流程

scenario.en: All use cases tested, process formalized, detection targets set
scenario.zh: 測試所有使用案例，流程正式化並設定偵測目標

scenario.en: All use cases tested, visibility and detection targets used in improvements
scenario.zh: 測試所有使用案例，並將可視性與偵測目標用於改善

text.en: Do you test detection analytics not directly associated with MITRE ATT&CK®?
text.zh: 您是否測試與 MITRE ATT&CK® 無直接關聯的偵測分析？

scenario.en: Use case testing not in place
scenario.zh: 尚無使用案例測試

scenario.en: Use case testing performed in ad-hoc fashion, no detection targets set
scenario.zh: 以臨機方式進行使用案例測試，未設定偵測目標

scenario.en: Some use case testing performed, detection targets set, no formal process
scenario.zh: 進行部分使用案例測試並設定偵測目標，但無正式流程

scenario.en: All use cases tested, process formalized, detection targets set
scenario.zh: 測試所有使用案例，流程正式化並設定偵測目標

scenario.en: All use cases tested, visibility and detection targets used in improvements
scenario.zh: 測試所有使用案例，並將可視性與偵測目標用於改善

text.en: Do you test response playbooks?
text.zh: 您是否測試應變劇本（playbook）？

scenario.en: Response playbooks not tested
scenario.zh: 未測試應變劇本

scenario.en: Response playbooks tested in an ad-hoc fashion
scenario.zh: 以臨機方式測試應變劇本

scenario.en: Some response playbooks tested, no formal process
scenario.zh: 測試部分應變劇本，但無正式流程

scenario.en: Response playbooks tested structurally following a documented process
scenario.zh: 有系統地測試應變劇本，並遵循文件化流程

scenario.en: All response playbooks formally tested, output used for improvements
scenario.zh: 正式測試所有應變劇本，並將產出用於改善

text.en: Is detection validation fully integrated in the detection engineering process / pipeline?
text.zh: 偵測驗證是否完全整合進偵測工程流程／管線？

scenario.en: New releases do not trigger ADT/AE
scenario.zh: 新發布不會觸發自動化偵測測試／對手模擬（ADT/AE）

scenario.en: New releases trigger ADT/AE in an ad-hoc fashion
scenario.zh: 新發布以臨機方式觸發 ADT/AE

scenario.en: Release process triggers ADT/AE for some use cases, not documented
scenario.zh: 發布流程對部分使用案例觸發 ADT/AE，但未文件化

scenario.en: Releases process triggers ADT/AE for all use cases, documented process
scenario.zh: 發布流程對所有使用案例觸發 ADT/AE，且流程已文件化

scenario.en: Full integration into release process, formalized and (partly) automated
scenario.zh: 完全整合進發布流程，並正式化且（部分）自動化

text.en: Is the outcome from detection validation used as input into monitoring and detection engineering?
text.zh: 偵測驗證的結果是否作為監控與偵測工程的輸入？

scenario.en: ADT/AE outcome not used
scenario.zh: 未運用 ADT/AE 結果

scenario.en: ADT/AE outcome used in an ad-hoc fashion
scenario.zh: 以臨機方式運用 ADT/AE 結果

scenario.en: ADT/AE outcome used, no documented process
scenario.zh: 已運用 ADT/AE 結果，但無文件化流程

scenario.en: ADT/AE outcome used, documented process
scenario.zh: 已運用 ADT/AE 結果，且流程已文件化

scenario.en: ADT/EA outcome used, process documented and regularly evaluated
scenario.zh: 已運用 ADT/AE 結果，流程已文件化並定期評估

text.en: Do you monitor the data ingestion status for data sources?
text.zh: 您是否監控各資料來源的資料匯入狀態？

scenario.en: Data ingestion status not monitored
scenario.zh: 未監控資料匯入狀態

scenario.en: Data ingestion status monitored in an ad-hoc fashion
scenario.zh: 以臨機方式監控資料匯入狀態

scenario.en: Data ingestion status monitored, not complete for all data source types
scenario.zh: 已監控資料匯入狀態，但未涵蓋所有資料來源類型

scenario.en: Data ingestion status monitored for all log sources, failures result in alerts
scenario.zh: 監控所有日誌來源的資料匯入狀態，失敗時觸發警示

scenario.en: Data ingestion status monitored, following a defined resolution process
scenario.zh: 監控資料匯入狀態，並遵循既定的處置流程

text.en: Do you actively measure and improve data source coverage?
text.zh: 您是否積極衡量並改善資料來源涵蓋率？

scenario.en: Data source coverage not measured
scenario.zh: 未衡量資料來源涵蓋率

scenario.en: Data source coverage measured in an ad-hoc fashion
scenario.zh: 以臨機方式衡量資料來源涵蓋率

scenario.en: Data source coverage measured , not complete for all data source types
scenario.zh: 已衡量資料來源涵蓋率，但未涵蓋所有資料來源類型

scenario.en: Data source coverage structurally measured and improved on
scenario.zh: 有系統地衡量並改善資料來源涵蓋率

scenario.en: Data source coverage structurally improved on following a defined process
scenario.zh: 遵循既定流程有系統地改善資料來源涵蓋率

text.en: Do you have an automation engineering process in place?
text.zh: 您是否建立了自動化工程流程？

scenario.en: An automation engineering process is not in place
scenario.zh: 尚無自動化工程流程

scenario.en: Automation engineering is done in an ad-hoc fashion
scenario.zh: 以臨機方式進行自動化工程

scenario.en: Basic process in place, not applied to all task areas
scenario.zh: 已有基本流程，但未套用於所有任務領域

scenario.en: Informal process in place covering all task areas
scenario.zh: 已有涵蓋所有任務領域的非正式流程

scenario.en: Formal process in place, covering all task areas
scenario.zh: 已有涵蓋所有任務領域的正式流程

text.en: Is the automation engineering process formally documented?
text.zh: 自動化工程流程是否已正式文件化？

scenario.en: No documentation in place
scenario.zh: 尚無任何文件

scenario.en: Some ad-hoc information across documents
scenario.zh: 資訊零散分布於各文件中，臨機應變

scenario.en: Basic documentation of automation engineering process
scenario.zh: 已有自動化工程流程的基本文件

scenario.en: Single document, full description of automation engineering process
scenario.zh: 彙整為單一文件，完整描述自動化工程流程

scenario.en: Document completed, approved and formally published
scenario.zh: 文件已完成、核准並正式發布

text.en: Are there specific roles and requirements for automation engineers?
text.zh: 是否為自動化工程師訂定專屬的角色與要求？

scenario.en: No specific roles and requirements
scenario.zh: 沒有專屬的角色與要求

scenario.en: Requirements identified, not formalised in roles
scenario.zh: 已辨識要求，但未正式納入角色

scenario.en: Requirements identified, role defined but not documented
scenario.zh: 已辨識要求並定義角色，但未文件化

scenario.en: Requirements identified, role defined and documented
scenario.zh: 已辨識要求並定義且記錄角色

scenario.en: Roles formally documented, approved and regularly revised
scenario.zh: 角色已正式文件化、核准並定期修訂

text.en: Are automations tracked and measured using defined metrics?
text.zh: 自動化是否以既定指標進行追蹤與量測？

scenario.en: No metrics in place
scenario.zh: 尚無指標

scenario.en: Some measurements performed on ad-hoc basis
scenario.zh: 以臨機方式進行部分量測

scenario.en: Metrics defined, measurements not consistently performed
scenario.zh: 已定義指標，但未一致進行量測

scenario.en: Measurements continuously performed, follow-up not consistent
scenario.zh: 持續進行量測，但後續追蹤不一致

scenario.en: Continuous measurement, connected to continuous improvement
scenario.zh: 持續量測並與持續改善連結

text.en: Are all SOC use cases touched or resolved by automation?
text.zh: 所有 SOC 使用案例是否都有自動化介入或處理？

scenario.en: No automation applied to SOC use cases
scenario.zh: 未對 SOC 使用案例套用自動化

scenario.en: Automation applied only to selected use cases
scenario.zh: 僅對選定的使用案例套用自動化

scenario.en: Most SOC use cases applied by generic automation (i.e. enrichment only)
scenario.zh: 大部分 SOC 使用案例套用通用自動化（如僅資料增補）

scenario.en: Most SOC use cases (80%) touched or resolved by specific automation
scenario.zh: 大部分 SOC 使用案例（80%）由特定自動化介入或處理

scenario.en: All SOC use cases (+95%) touched or resolved by specific automation
scenario.zh: 幾乎所有 SOC 使用案例（95% 以上）由特定自動化介入或處理

text.en: Are custom automation playbooks developed in the SOC?
text.zh: SOC 是否自行開發客製化自動化劇本？

scenario.en: No custom automation development
scenario.zh: 未進行客製化自動化開發

scenario.en: Customization of out-of-the-box automation playbooks
scenario.zh: 對現成自動化劇本進行客製化

scenario.en: Playbook development in place, limited application
scenario.zh: 已進行劇本開發，但應用範圍有限

scenario.en: Playbooks development process formalised and consistently performed
scenario.zh: 劇本開發流程已正式化並一致執行

scenario.en: Full playbook development process, measured and improved
scenario.zh: 完整的劇本開發流程，並量測與改善

text.en: Is there a testing procedure to test and validate automations?
text.zh: 是否有測試程序可測試與驗證自動化？

scenario.en: No testing performed
scenario.zh: 未進行測試

scenario.en: Testing performed in an ad-hoc manner
scenario.zh: 以臨機方式進行測試

scenario.en: Testing procedure defined, not applied consistently
scenario.zh: 已定義測試程序，但未一致執行

scenario.en: Testing procedure fully operational, applied consistently
scenario.zh: 測試程序完全運作並一致執行

scenario.en: Testing procedure fully operational, documented and regularly evaluated
scenario.zh: 測試程序完全運作，並文件化且定期評估

text.en: Is there a formal release process in place for new automations?
text.zh: 是否有針對新自動化的正式發布流程？

scenario.en: Release process not in place
scenario.zh: 尚無發布流程

scenario.en: Releases performed in an ad-hoc manner
scenario.zh: 以臨機方式進行發布

scenario.en: Releases done structurally, process not documented of formalised
scenario.zh: 有系統地進行發布，但流程未文件化或正式化

scenario.en: Releases done structurally, process documentation in place
scenario.zh: 有系統地進行發布，且流程已文件化

scenario.en: Formal release procedure in place, documented and regularly evaluated
scenario.zh: 已有正式發布程序，並文件化且定期評估

text.en: Do you have a AI adoption strategy for the SOC in place?
text.zh: 您是否為 SOC 訂定了 AI 導入策略？

scenario.en: No AI adoption strategy in place
scenario.zh: 尚無 AI 導入策略

scenario.en: Some ad-hoc information across documents
scenario.zh: 資訊零散分布於各文件中，臨機應變

scenario.en: Basic documentation of AI adoption strategy
scenario.zh: 已有 AI 導入策略的基本文件

scenario.en: Single document, full description of AI adoption strategy
scenario.zh: 彙整為單一文件，完整描述 AI 導入策略

scenario.en: Document completed, approved and formally published
scenario.zh: 文件已完成、核准並正式發布

text.en: Is the AI adoption strategy internally aligned and approved by relevant stakeholders?
text.zh: AI 導入策略是否經內部對齊並由相關利害關係人核准？

scenario.en: No internal alignment or approval
scenario.zh: 尚無內部對齊或核准

scenario.en: Initial ad-hoc conversations with internal stakeholders completed
scenario.zh: 已與內部利害關係人完成初步的臨機討論

scenario.en: Some alignment in place, not complete or approved
scenario.zh: 已有部分對齊，但尚未完整或核准

scenario.en: SOC AI strategy aligned with stakeholders, not formally approved
scenario.zh: SOC AI 策略已與利害關係人對齊，但未正式核准

scenario.en: SOC AI strategy fully aligned with broader AI strategy, formally approved
scenario.zh: SOC AI 策略已與整體 AI 策略完全對齊並正式核准

text.en: Is there a log management process in place?
text.zh: 是否建立了日誌管理流程？

scenario.en: Log management process is not in place
scenario.zh: 尚無日誌管理流程

scenario.en: Log management is done in an ad-hoc fashion
scenario.zh: 以臨機方式進行日誌管理

scenario.en: Log management process in place, but not applied structurally
scenario.zh: 已有日誌管理流程，但未有系統性運用

scenario.en: Log management process in place addressing most requirements
scenario.zh: 已有日誌管理流程並滿足大部分需求

scenario.en: Log management process in place, all requirements met, formally approved
scenario.zh: 已有日誌管理流程，滿足所有需求並正式核准

text.en: Are log management elements formally identified and documented?
text.zh: 日誌管理要素是否已正式辨識並文件化？

scenario.en: No log management elements identified
scenario.zh: 尚未辨識任何日誌管理要素

scenario.en: Some elements identified, managed in ad-hoc fashion
scenario.zh: 已辨識部分要素，並以臨機方式管理

scenario.en: Most elements identified, no structured approach
scenario.zh: 已辨識大部分要素，但無結構化方法

scenario.en: Most elements identified, no managed with a structured approach
scenario.zh: 已辨識大部分要素，但未以結構化方法管理

scenario.en: All elements identified, and actively managed through a defined process
scenario.zh: 已辨識所有要素，並透過既定流程主動管理

text.en: Is the log management process supported by corporate policy?
text.zh: 日誌管理流程是否有企業政策支持？

scenario.en: No policy is in place
scenario.zh: 尚無政策

scenario.en: Log management requirements scattered across documents
scenario.zh: 日誌管理需求零散分布於各文件中

scenario.en: A policy exists, but has not been accepted formally
scenario.zh: 已有政策，但尚未正式採納

scenario.en: A formal policy exists, but is not actively enforced
scenario.zh: 已有正式政策，但未積極執行

scenario.en: A formal policy exists, actively enforced and supported by stakeholders
scenario.zh: 已有正式政策，並積極執行且受利害關係人支持

text.en: Is the log management process supported by appropriate centralised log management tooling?
text.zh: 日誌管理流程是否有適當的集中式日誌管理工具支援？

scenario.en: No tooling in place
scenario.zh: 尚無工具

scenario.en: Log management implemented using a variety of tools
scenario.zh: 使用多種工具實作日誌管理

scenario.en: Centralized tooling in place, configured for basic log management
scenario.zh: 已有集中式工具，並設定為基本日誌管理

scenario.en: Centralized tooling in place, managed and meeting most requirements
scenario.zh: 已有集中式工具，受管理並滿足大部分需求

scenario.en: Centralized tooling in place, managed, and optimized for log management
scenario.zh: 已有集中式工具，受管理並針對日誌管理最佳化

text.en: Is the log management process compliant with applicable standards & regulations?
text.zh: 日誌管理流程是否遵循適用的標準與法規？

scenario.en: Regulations are not known and the process is non-compliant
scenario.zh: 不了解相關法規，且流程未合規

scenario.en: Some regulations are known and the process is non-compliant
scenario.zh: 了解部分法規，但流程未合規

scenario.en: Most regulations are known and the process is partially compliant
scenario.zh: 了解大部分法規，且流程部分合規

scenario.en: Regulations are fully known and the process is mostly compliant
scenario.zh: 充分了解法規，且流程大致合規

scenario.en: Regulations are fully known and the process is fully compliant
scenario.zh: 充分了解法規，且流程完全合規

text.en: Is the log management process aligned with all stakeholders?
text.zh: 日誌管理流程是否與所有利害關係人對齊？

scenario.en: Stakeholders are unfamiliar with the process
scenario.zh: 利害關係人不熟悉此流程

scenario.en: Some stakeholders are aware of the process, but not its details
scenario.zh: 部分利害關係人知道此流程，但不了解細節

scenario.en: Process awareness in most stakeholders, but no process alignment
scenario.zh: 大部分利害關係人知道此流程，但未對齊流程

scenario.en: Process aligned with all relevant stakeholders, no formal approval
scenario.zh: 流程已與所有相關利害關係人對齊，但未正式核准

scenario.en: Process aligned with all relevant stakeholders, formal approval in place
scenario.zh: 流程已與所有相關利害關係人對齊並正式核准

text.en: Is logging encrypted in transfer, in use, and at rest?
text.zh: 日誌在傳輸中、使用中與靜態時是否加密？

scenario.en: No encryption performed
scenario.zh: 未進行加密

scenario.en: Some logging encrypted at rest or in transfer
scenario.zh: 部分日誌在靜態或傳輸中加密

scenario.en: Most logging encrypted at rest and in transfer
scenario.zh: 大部分日誌在靜態與傳輸中加密

scenario.en: All logging encrypted (rest & transfer), encryption keys not formally managed
scenario.zh: 所有日誌皆加密（靜態與傳輸），但金鑰未正式管理

scenario.en: All logging encrypted (rest & transfer), encryption keys centrally managed
scenario.zh: 所有日誌皆加密（靜態與傳輸），且金鑰集中管理

text.en: Is access to logging restricted to authorized personnel?
text.zh: 日誌的存取是否僅限授權人員？

scenario.en: Access to the system not restricted
scenario.zh: 未限制系統存取

scenario.en: Basic access control in place
scenario.zh: 已有基本存取控制

scenario.en: Granular access rights implemented, not monitored
scenario.zh: 已實作細緻的存取權限，但未監控

scenario.en: Granular access rights implemented and monitored, not reviewed
scenario.zh: 已實作並監控細緻的存取權限，但未檢討

scenario.en: Granular access rights implemented, monitored and reviewed regularly
scenario.zh: 已實作細緻的存取權限，並監控且定期檢討

text.en: Has functional ownership of the solution been formally assigned?
text.zh: 解決方案的功能權責是否已正式指派？

scenario.en: Functional ownership not assigned

scenario.zh: 彙整為單一文件，完整描述該服務

scenario.en: Document completed, approved and formally published
scenario.zh: 文件已完成、核准並正式發布

text.en: Is the service measured for quality?
text.zh: 該服務是否衡量品質？

scenario.en: Service not measured for quality
scenario.zh: 未衡量服務品質

scenario.en: Metrics defined, applied in an ad-hoc fashion
scenario.zh: 已定義指標，並以臨機方式套用

scenario.en: Metrics defined, applied in a structured but informal fashion
scenario.zh: 已定義指標，並以結構化但非正式的方式套用

scenario.en: Metrics formalized and used in regular reports
scenario.zh: 指標已正式化並用於定期報告

scenario.en: Formal and approved metrics in place, feedback used for improvement
scenario.zh: 已有正式且經核准的指標，並將回饋用於改善

text.en: Is the service measured for service delivery in accordance with service levels?
text.zh: 該服務是否依服務水準衡量其服務交付？

scenario.en: Service not measured
scenario.zh: 未衡量服務

scenario.en: SLA defined, measured in an ad-hoc fashion
scenario.zh: 已定義 SLA，並以臨機方式衡量

scenario.en: SLA defined, measured periodically but not reported
scenario.zh: 已定義 SLA 並定期衡量，但未提報

scenario.en: SLA compliance reported periodically, not discussed with customers
scenario.zh: 定期提報 SLA 符合度，但未與客戶討論

scenario.en: SLA compliance discussed with customers regularly for improvement
scenario.zh: 定期與客戶討論 SLA 符合度以進行改善

text.en: Are customers and/or stakeholders regularly updated about the service?
text.zh: 是否定期向客戶及／或利害關係人提供服務的更新資訊？

scenario.en: No updates sent to customers/stakeholders
scenario.zh: 未向客戶／利害關係人提供更新

scenario.en: Ad-hoc updates sent to some customers/stakeholders
scenario.zh: 臨機向部分客戶／利害關係人提供更新

scenario.en: Frequent updates sent to most customers/stakeholders
scenario.zh: 經常向大部分客戶／利害關係人提供更新

scenario.en: Periodical updates sent to all customers/stakeholders
scenario.zh: 定期向所有客戶／利害關係人提供更新

scenario.en: Periodical updates sent and discussed with all customers/stakeholders
scenario.zh: 定期向所有客戶／利害關係人提供更新並共同討論

text.en: Is there a contractual agreement between the SOC and the customers?
text.zh: SOC 與客戶之間是否有契約協議？

scenario.en: Contractual agreements not in place
scenario.zh: 尚無任何契約協議

scenario.en: No contract in place, ad-hoc agreements made
scenario.zh: 無正式契約，僅有臨機達成的協議

scenario.en: Basic contract in place, not formally signed of
scenario.zh: 已有基本契約，但尚未正式簽署

scenario.en: Contract signed, but not regularly reviewed
scenario.zh: 契約已簽署，但未定期檢討

scenario.en: Contract signed, approved by- and regularly reviewed with customers
scenario.zh: 契約已簽署核准，並定期與客戶共同檢討

text.en: Is sufficient personnel allocated to the process to ensure required service delivery?
text.zh: 是否配置足夠人力於此流程，以確保所需的服務交付？

scenario.en: No personnel allocated
scenario.zh: 未配置人力

scenario.en: Personnel allocated, but not sufficient for required service delivery
scenario.zh: 已配置人力，但不足以支應所需服務交付

scenario.en: Personnel allocated, not dedicated for this service
scenario.zh: 已配置人力，但非專責於此服務

scenario.en: Sufficient dedicated personnel available, not fully trained and capable
scenario.zh: 已有足夠的專責人員，但未完全受訓或具備能力

scenario.en: Sufficient dedicated personnel available, trained and fully capable
scenario.zh: 已有足夠的專責人員，且受訓並完全具備能力

text.en: Is the service aligned with other relevant processes?
text.zh: 該服務是否與其他相關流程對齊？

scenario.en: Process not aligned
scenario.zh: 流程未對齊

scenario.en: Alignment done in an ad-hoc fashion
scenario.zh: 以臨機方式進行對齊

scenario.en: Alignment done regularly, but not in a structured fashion
scenario.zh: 定期進行對齊，但未採結構化方式

scenario.en: Alignment done structurally & regularly with most relevant processes
scenario.zh: 與大部分相關流程有系統地定期對齊

scenario.en: Alignment done structurally & regularly with all relevant processes
scenario.zh: 與所有相關流程有系統地定期對齊

text.en: Is there a incident resolution / service continuity process in place for this service?
text.zh: 該服務是否有事件處置／服務持續流程？

scenario.en: No such process in place
scenario.zh: 尚無此類流程

scenario.en: Continuity requirements identified, process not yet in place
scenario.zh: 已辨識持續性需求，但尚無流程

scenario.en: Basic service continuity process in place
scenario.zh: 已有基本的服務持續流程

scenario.en: Full process in place, not approved by relevant stakeholders
scenario.zh: 已有完整流程，但未經相關利害關係人核准

scenario.en: Full process in place, formally approved by relevant stakeholders
scenario.zh: 已有完整流程，並經相關利害關係人正式核准

text.en: Has a set of procedures been created for this service?
text.zh: 是否為該服務建立了一套程序？

scenario.en: No procedures in place
scenario.zh: 尚無程序

scenario.en: Basic procedures in place, used in an ad-hoc fashion
scenario.zh: 已有基本程序，並以臨機方式使用

scenario.en: All procedures in place, operational but not used structurally
scenario.zh: 已有所有程序並可運作，但未有系統性使用

scenario.en: Procedures in place, operational and used structurally
scenario.zh: 已有程序，可運作並有系統性使用

scenario.en: Procedures in place, formally published and fully operationalized
scenario.zh: 已有程序，正式發布並完全落實運作

text.en: Is there an onboarding and offloading procedure for this service?
text.zh: 該服務是否有納管（onboarding）與卸載（offloading）程序？

scenario.en: No procedures in place
scenario.zh: 尚無程序

scenario.en: Basic procedures in place, used in an ad-hoc fashion
scenario.zh: 已有基本程序，並以臨機方式使用

scenario.en: Full procedures in place, operational but not used structurally
scenario.zh: 已有完整程序並可運作，但未有系統性使用

scenario.en: Procedures in place, operational and used structurally
scenario.zh: 已有程序，可運作並有系統性使用

scenario.en: Procedures in place, formally published and regularly reviewed
scenario.zh: 已有程序，正式發布並定期檢討

text.en: Are best practices applied to the service?
text.zh: 該服務是否採用最佳實務？

scenario.en: Best practices not applied
scenario.zh: 未採用最佳實務

scenario.en: Best practices identified, but not applied
scenario.zh: 已辨識最佳實務，但未採用

scenario.en: Best practices applied, but not structurally
scenario.zh: 已採用最佳實務，但未成體系

scenario.en: Best practices applied to service architecture and service delivery
scenario.zh: 已將最佳實務套用於服務架構與服務交付

scenario.en: Best practices applied and adherence checked regularly
scenario.zh: 已採用最佳實務並定期檢查遵循情形

text.en: Is process data gathered for prediction of service performance?
text.zh: 是否蒐集流程資料以預測服務績效？

scenario.en: Service performance not measured
scenario.zh: 未衡量服務績效

scenario.en: Goals set for service performance, measured ad-hoc
scenario.zh: 已設定服務績效目標，並以臨機方式衡量

scenario.en: Goals set for service performance, measured structurally but informally
scenario.zh: 已設定服務績效目標，並有系統但非正式地衡量

scenario.en: Goals set for service performance, measured structurally and formally
scenario.zh: 已設定服務績效目標，並有系統且正式地衡量

scenario.en: Continuous measurement to determine progress & adjust process
scenario.zh: 持續衡量以判定進度並調整流程

text.en: Is the service continuously being improved based on improvement goals?
text.zh: 該服務是否依改善目標持續改善？

scenario.en: Improvement not done
scenario.zh: 未進行改善

scenario.en: Goals defined, but not pursued
scenario.zh: 已定義目標，但未推動

scenario.en: Goals defined and pursued structurally, but not formalized
scenario.zh: 已定義目標並有系統地推動，但未正式化

scenario.en: Goals formally defined and pursued structurally and periodically
scenario.zh: 已正式定義目標並有系統地定期推動

scenario.en: Continuous improvement based on targets and feedback loops
scenario.zh: 依目標與回饋循環持續改善

subcategory.en: Critical objectives, capabilities, and services that stakeholders depend on or expect from the organization are understood and communicated
subcategory.zh: 已理解並傳達利害關係人所依賴或期望組織提供的關鍵目標、能力與服務

subcategory.en: Internal and external stakeholders are understood, and their needs and expectations regarding cybersecurity risk management are understood and considered
subcategory.zh: 已理解內部與外部利害關係人，並理解且納入其對資安風險管理的需求與期望

subcategory.en: Risk management objectives are established and agreed to by organizational stakeholders
subcategory.zh: 風險管理目標已建立並經組織利害關係人同意

subcategory.en: Policy for managing cybersecurity risks is established based on organizational context, cybersecurity strategy, and priorities and is communicated and enforced
subcategory.zh: 管理資安風險的政策已依組織情境、資安策略與優先順序建立，並予以傳達與落實

subcategory.en: Policy for managing cybersecurity risks is reviewed, updated, communicated, and enforced to reflect changes in requirements, threats, technology, and organizational mission
subcategory.zh: 管理資安風險的政策已檢討、更新、傳達並落實，以反映需求、威脅、技術與組織使命的變化

subcategory.en: Improvements are identified from evaluations
subcategory.zh: 從評估中找出改善事項

subcategory.en: Cyber threat intelligence is received from information sharing forums and sources
subcategory.zh: 從資訊分享論壇與來源接收網路威脅情資

subcategory.en: Cybersecurity roles and responsibilities for suppliers, customers, and partners are established, communicated, and coordinated internally and externally
subcategory.zh: 供應商、客戶與夥伴的資安角色與職責已建立、傳達，並在內部與外部協調

subcategory.en: Legal, regulatory, and contractual requirements regarding cybersecurity - including privacy and civil liberties obligations - are understood and managed
subcategory.zh: 已理解並管理與資安相關的法令、法規與契約要求（含隱私與公民自由義務）

subcategory.en: Adequate resources are allocated commensurate with the cybersecurity risk strategy, roles, responsibilities, and policies
subcategory.zh: 已依資安風險策略、角色、職責與政策配置適當資源

subcategory.en: Roles, responsibilities, and authorities related to cybersecurity risk management are established, communicated, understood, and enforced
subcategory.zh: 與資安風險管理相關的角色、職責與權限已建立、傳達、被理解並落實

subcategory.en: Personnel are provided with awareness and training so that they possess the knowledge and skills to perform general tasks with cybersecurity risks in mind
subcategory.zh: 已對人員提供意識宣導與訓練，使其具備在顧及資安風險下執行一般任務的知識與技能

subcategory.en: Cybersecurity is included in human resources practices
subcategory.zh: 資安已納入人力資源實務

subcategory.en: Individuals in specialized roles are provided with awareness and training so that they possess the knowledge and skills to perform relevant tasks with cybersecurity risks in mind
subcategory.zh: 已對擔任專業角色者提供意識宣導與訓練，使其具備在顧及資安風險下執行相關任務的知識與技能

subcategory.en: Improvements are identified from security tests and exercises, including those done in coordination with suppliers and relevant third parties
subcategory.zh: 從資安測試與演練（含與供應商及相關第三方協同進行者）中找出改善事項

subcategory.en: Internal and external threats to the organization are identified and recorded
subcategory.zh: 已辨識並記錄組織面臨的內部與外部威脅

subcategory.en: Adequate resource capacity to ensure availability is maintained
subcategory.zh: 維持足夠的資源容量以確保可用性

subcategory.en: Suppliers are known and prioritized by criticality
subcategory.zh: 已掌握供應商並依關鍵性排定優先順序

subcategory.en: Mechanisms are implemented to achieve resilience requirements in normal and adverse situations
subcategory.zh: 已實作機制，以在正常與不利情況下達成韌性需求

subcategory.en: Backups of data are created, protected, maintained, and tested
subcategory.zh: 已建立、保護、維護並測試資料備份

subcategory.en: Incident response plans and other cybersecurity plans that affect operations are established, communicated, maintained, and improved
subcategory.zh: 影響營運的事件應變計畫與其他資安計畫已建立、傳達、維護並改善

subcategory.en: Networks and environments are protected from unauthorized logical access and usage
subcategory.zh: 網路與環境受到保護，防止未經授權的邏輯存取與使用

category.en: Identity Management, Authentication, and Access Control
category.zh: 身分管理、鑑別與存取控制

subcategory.en: Access permissions, entitlements, and authorizations are defined in a policy, managed, enforced, and reviewed, and incorporate the principles of least privilege and separation of duties
subcategory.zh: 存取權限與授權已於政策中定義、管理、落實並檢討，且納入最小權限與職責分離原則

subcategory.en: Log records are generated and made available for continuous monitoring
subcategory.zh: 已產生日誌紀錄並提供持續監控使用

subcategory.en: Networks and network services are monitored to find potentially adverse events
subcategory.zh: 監控網路與網路服務，以發現潛在的不良事件

subcategory.en: The physical environment is monitored to find potentially adverse events
subcategory.zh: 監控實體環境，以發現潛在的不良事件

subcategory.en: Personnel activity and technology usage are monitored to find potentially adverse events
subcategory.zh: 監控人員活動與技術使用情形，以發現潛在的不良事件

subcategory.en: Computing hardware and software, runtime environments, and their data are monitored to find potentially adverse events
subcategory.zh: 監控運算硬體與軟體、執行環境及其資料，以發現潛在的不良事件

subcategory.en: External service provider activities and services are monitored to find potentially adverse events
subcategory.zh: 監控外部服務提供者的活動與服務，以發現潛在的不良事件

subcategory.en: Information is correlated from multiple sources
subcategory.zh: 從多個來源關聯彙整資訊

subcategory.en: Information on adverse events is provided to authorized staff and tools
subcategory.zh: 將不良事件資訊提供給經授權的人員與工具

subcategory.en: Systems, hardware, software, services, and data are managed throughout their life cycles
subcategory.zh: 系統、硬體、軟體、服務與資料在其整個生命週期中均受管理

subcategory.en: Hardware is maintained, replaced, and removed commensurate with risk
subcategory.zh: 依風險程度維護、汰換並移除硬體

subcategory.en: Software is maintained, replaced, and removed commensurate with risk
subcategory.zh: 依風險程度維護、汰換並移除軟體

subcategory.en: Improvements are identified from execution of operational processes, procedures, and activities
subcategory.zh: 從營運流程、程序與活動的執行中找出改善事項

category.zh: 事件應變的報告與溝通

subcategory.en: Internal and external stakeholders are notified of incidents
subcategory.zh: 已將事件通知內部與外部利害關係人

category.zh: 事件應變的報告與溝通

subcategory.en: Information is shared with designated internal and external stakeholders
subcategory.zh: 與指定的內部與外部利害關係人分享資訊

subcategory.en: The incident response plan is executed in coordination with relevant third parties once an incident is declared
subcategory.zh: 事件一經宣告，即與相關第三方協同執行事件應變計畫

subcategory.en: Incidents are contained
subcategory.zh: 事件已獲控制（圍堵）

subcategory.en: Incidents are eradicated
subcategory.zh: 事件已被根除

subcategory.en: Incident reports are triaged and validated
subcategory.zh: 事件通報經過分流與驗證

subcategory.en: Analysis is performed to establish what has taken place during an incident and the root cause of the incident
subcategory.zh: 進行分析以釐清事件發生的經過及其根本原因

subcategory.en: Potentially adverse events are analyzed to better understand associated activities
subcategory.zh: 分析潛在的不良事件，以更深入理解相關活動

subcategory.en: Vulnerabilities in assets are identified, validated, and recorded
subcategory.zh: 已辨識、驗證並記錄資產中的弱點

subcategory.en: Organizational cybersecurity risk management performance is evaluated and reviewed for adjustments needed
subcategory.zh: 已評估並檢討組織資安風險管理的成效，以判斷所需調整

subcategory.en: The confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data-at-rest are protected
subcategory.zh: 靜態資料的機密性、完整性與可用性受到保護

subcategory.en: The confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data-in-transit are protected
subcategory.zh: 傳輸中資料的機密性、完整性與可用性受到保護

subcategory.en: [Withdrawn: Incorporated into ID.AM-08, PR.PS-03]
subcategory.zh: ［已撤銷：併入 ID.AM-08、PR.PS-03］
